design_plan: rng=Deterministic(42); AIDA=pass; hero_lines=2.3@1120px; bento_density=grid-auto-flow:dense; labels_checked; CTA_contrast=AA+
headline: Personal AI Agent Market Brief

site_brief.audience: buyers and builders tracking personal AI agents
site_brief.goal: Create a frequently refreshed editorial blog homepage with a lead analysis, short posts, source cards, and a clear Super perspective on why computer-use caching makes repeated agent work cheaper and better.
site_brief.title: Personal AI Agent Market Brief

summary: A June 2026 editorial brief for buyers and builders tracking personal AI agents — from ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, and Siri to niche tools like Folk and Orchids — with a clear Super perspective on why real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache matter as agents grow more powerful and more exposed to security risk.
